name: Evil Eye Repose
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>静</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>冠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>呪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>眼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When you activate this card: You can banish 1 "Evil Eye" card from your GY; draw 1 card. Once per turn, after damage calculation, if your "Evil Eye" monster equipped with "Evil Eye of Selene" attacked an opponent's monster: You can banish that opponent's monster. If this card in the Spell & Trap Zone is destroyed by card effect: You can target up to 3 of your banished "Evil Eye" cards; return them to the GY. You can only activate 1 "Evil Eye Repose" per turn.
eff: When you activate this card: You can banish 1 "Evil Eye" card from your GY; draw 1 card. Once per turn, after damage calculation, if your "Evil Eye" monster equipped with "Evil Eye of Selene" attacked an opponent's monster: You can banish that opponent's monster. If this card in the Spell & Trap Zone is destroyed by card effect: You can target up to 3 of your banished "Evil Eye" cards; return them to the GY. You can only activate 1 "Evil Eye Repose" per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Returns banished cards to the Graveyard
